stem: A digital marketing study surveys 200 users shown the ad and observes 91 positive outcomes out of 200 (45.5%). Estimate the true click-through rate and provide a 95% confidence interval.

ground_truth.answer: Sample proportion: 0.455. Wilson 95% CI: [0.3875, 0.5242]. Point estimate: 0.4558.

common_failure_modes: Using the Wald interval (p̂ ± z√(p̂(1-p̂)/n)) which performs poorly for small samples
Not reporting the confidence interval alongside the point estimate
